heroTitle: Science that protects what time takes away.
heroSubtitle: Arata Nutraceuticals pioneers evidence-based longevity formulations for India's most demanding health seekers — built on landmark clinical trials, not marketing claims.
productDesc: Aeternyx™ is Arata’s flagship longevity formulation — a precisely engineered once-daily capsule combining ten synergistic compounds targeting oxidative stress, chronic inflammation, cardiovascular resilience, mitochondrial function, and cellular protection.
aboutQuote: “Oxidative stress and chronic inflammation are the silent architects of premature ageing. Aeternyx™ was designed to interrupt that process at the cellular level.”
